request_text: Remediate #2794: add an autouse fixture to tests/specify_cli/cli/commands/agent/conftest.py that unsets SPEC_KITTY_SYNC_MINIMAL_IMPORT and SPEC_KITTY_SYNC_DISABLE before every test (monkeypatch.delenv raising=False), making the pre-review-gate observability tests worker/order-independent and killing the leaked-value monkeypatch perpetuation. Verify the 10 observability tests pass with the sync toggle pre-set in the environment, and that the escape-hatch tests (which set the toggles explicitly) still pass.
